arts.ttl: I felt like the scapegoat after the Euros – Jude Bellingham
arts.sum: Bellingham believes he was harshly criticised as England reached the final before losing to Spain.
Liverpool's 2024/25 squad has been ranked ahead of the January transfer window, and very few players could face uncertain futures.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham claims he was made "scapegoat" for England's Euro 2024 failure
arts.sum: England struggled their way to the Euro 2024 final with Jude Bellingham playing a key role in Gareth Southgate's side before defeat to Spain in the final - but the Real Madrid star feels he has taken the flak

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso drops unexpected contract remark just weeks after emotional Liverpool return
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen have six players sidelined through injury for their first Champions League match since the side Xabi Alonso coaches lost 4-0 to Liverpool at Anfield

arts.ttl: Premier League table without Mo Salah's heroics - with Liverpool in 13th and surprising leader
arts.sum: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah has more goal involvements than any other player in the Premier League this season and the numbers lay bare his importance to his club

arts.ttl: “There are too many games” – Carlo Ancelotti echoes Vinicius Junior sentiments after injury
arts.sum: Real Madrid received a major blow earlier this week when it was confirmed that Vinicius Junior had suffered an injury during Sunday’s victory over Leganes. He will miss Wednesday’s Champions League showdown against Liverpool, and his overall time on the sidelines is expected to be 2-3 weeks. As per Diario AS, Ancelotti opened up on […] The post “There are too many games” – Carlo Ancelotti echoes Vinicius Junior sentiments after injury appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Liverpool confirm Trent Alexander-Arnold status to face Real Madrid
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has spoken out on the availability of star defender Trent Alexander-Arnold to face Real Madrid this week. Liverpool and Real are of course primed to…

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson used Liverpool game as excuse to break promise he made at Man Utd
arts.sum: Dimitar Berbatov was made a promise by Sir Alex Ferguson when he joined Manchester United, but a crucial Liverpool fixture at Anfield meant the Scot quickly went back on his word

arts.ttl: Liverpool on course for £175m jackpot that easily funds Mohamed Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold contracts
'I felt a bit like the scapegoat' - Bellingham
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham says he has got his smile back after "feeling a bit like the scapegoat" for England's failure to win Euro 2024.
